content:
=== Dota 2 Patch 7.41b === HERO CHANGES: Anti-Mage: • Max Mana Burned per hit increased from 1.6/2.4/3.2/4% to 1.8/2.7/3.6/4.5% • [Talent] Level 20 Talent Blink Cast Range decreased from +150 to +125 Bloodseeker: • Mana Cost increased from 100/150/200 to 125/175/225 • [Talent] Level 25 Talent Max Thirst Move Speed decreased from +18% to +15% Crystal Maiden: • Cooldown increased from 10s to 12s Drow Ranger: • Base Agility increased from 22 to 24 • Damage at level 1 increased from 49-56 to 51-58 • Enemy hero disable range decreased from 325 to 300 • While on the glacier, Marksmanship now can be disabled by enemies in the proximity • [Talent] Level 25 Talent Multishot Waves increased from +1 to +2 Juggernaut: • Base Movement Speed increased from 300 to 305 • Base Agility per stack increased from 2.5% + 0.05% per level to 2.5% + 0.1% per level • [Talent] Level 20 Talent Blade Fury Damage per second increased from +100 to +120 Pudge: • Strength gain per stack increased from 1.6 to 2.0 Sand King: • Attack Slow decreased from 50/55/60 to 30/40/50 • Aghanim's Scepter Stinger damage decreased from 50% to 40% Tiny: • Intelligence gain increased from 2.2 to 2.4 • No longer applies cleave Windranger: • Base Health Regen increased by 0.5 • Slow increased from 20/25/30/35% to 22/28/34/40% • Cooldown decreased from 30s to 25s Shadow Shaman: • Intelligence gain decreased from 3.5 to 3.3 Slardar: • Cooldown increased from 29/25/21/17s to 33/28/23/18s Tidehunter: • Base Strength decreased from 26 to 25 • Damage at level 1 decreased from 51-57 to 50-56 • Now gains fish on every even level instead of every level • [Talent] Level 15 Talent Gush Damage decreased from +100 to +90 • [Talent] Level 25 Talent Anchor Smash affects buildings now deals 50% damage to buildings Enigma: • Movement Slow increased from 4% + 1% per level to 5% + 1% per level • Fixed Eidolons not having an 8 attack damage spread • Eidolon Damage increased from 16/27/38/49 to 16/28/40/52 • As a result, damage changed from 16/27/38/49 to 12-20/24-32/36-44/48-56 Tinker: • Missile speed increased from 1200 to 1350 • Base activation time decreased from 0.3s to 0s • Aghanim's Scepter no longer makes activation faster Necrophos: • Mana Cost increased from 125 to 160 Beastmaster: • Base Attack Speed decreased from 100 to 90 • Debuff Duration rescaled from 12s to 10/11/12/13s • [Talent] Level 10 Talent Armor decreased from +5 to +4 • [Talent] Level 10 Talent Wild Axes Damage Amp Per Stack decreased from +2% to +1.5% Death Prophet: • Spirit Damage increased from 64 to 65/68/71 Phantom Assassin: • Strength gain increased from 2.0 to 2.2 • Duration increased from 2.5s to 3s • Bonus Attack Speed rescaled from 100/130/160/190 to 80/120/160/200 • Critical Damage increased from 200/300/400% to 200/325/450% Nature's Prophet: • Base Damage increased from 90/130/170 to 100/140/180 Clinkz: • [Talent] Level 10 Talent Strafe Duration increased from +0.75s to +1s Omniknight: • Damage to heal increased from 30% to 35% • Duration increased from 4/4.5/5s to 4/4.75/5.5s • Aghanim's Scepter Bonus Health Restoration decreased from 100% to 50% • [Talent] Level 20 Talent Degen Aura Radius increased from +125 to +150 Night Stalker: • Base Health Regen decreased by 1.25 Broodmother: • Base agility increased from 18 to 20 • Damage at level 1 increased from 45-51 to 47-53 Jakiro: • Cooldown rescaled from 10s to 12/11/10/9s • Burn Damage rescaled from 15/25/35/45 to 12/24/36/48 • Mana Cost decreased from 300/400/500 to 250/350/450 • [Talent] Level 20 Talent Macropyre Damage increased from +20 to +25 Batrider: • Base Armor decreased by 1 • Cooldown increased from 45/40/35/30s to 48/42/36/30s • [Talent] Level 15 Talent Sticky Napalm Movement Slow increased from +0.5% to +0.75% Chen: • Bonus Damage increased from 0/6/12/18% to 5/10/15/20% Spectre: • Strength gain decreased from 2.4 to 2.3 • Max Radius decreased from 800 to 700 • [Talent] Level 10 Talent Spectral Dagger Cooldown Reduction decreased from 4s to 3s Ancient Apparition: • Aghanim's Scepter Strength Reduction bonus increased from 0.3 to 0.8 Doom: • Damage decreased from 20/35/50/65 to 20/30/40/50 • Damage per second decreased from 25/45/66 to 22/44/66 • [Talent] Level 10 Talent Devour grants 15% Magic Resistance replaced with +10% Magic Resistance • [Talent] Level 15 Talent +66 Damage replaced with +1.5% Infernal Blade Max HP As Damage • [Talent] Level 20 Talent +2.5% Infernal Blade Max HP As Damage replaced with +66 Damage Gyrocopter: • Cooldown rescaled from 26/24/22/20s to 25s • Cooldown decreased from 90/75/60s to 75/65/55s Alchemist: • Base Agility decreased from 22 to 19 • [Talent] Level 10 Talent +1 Acid Spray Armor Reduction replaced with +1% Corrosive Weaponry Slow / Damage Reduction Per Stack • [Talent] Level 15 Talent +1% Corrosive Weaponry Slow / Damage Reduction Per Stack replaced with +1 Acid Spray Armor Reduction Invoker: • Now grants Invoker an additional Ability Point at hero levels 6, 12, and 18 • [Talent] Level 20 Talent +1 Orb Levels replaced with +50% Forged Spirit Armor Reduction Silencer: • [Talent] Level 15 Talent Global Silence Cooldown Reduction decreased from 20s to 15s Lycan: • Cooldown decreased from 110/100/90s to 105/95/85s Shadow Demon: • Illusion Duration decreased from 11/12/13/14s to 8/10/12/14s • [Talent] Level 15 Talent Movement Speed decreased from +25 to +20 Chaos Knight: • Cooldown increased from 75s to 85/80/75s • Number of Phantasms increased from 1/2/3 to 3 • Phantasm Damage decreased from 100% to 50/75/100% Meepo: • Base Movement Speed decreased from 315 to 310 • Strength gain decreased from 2.2 to 2.0 • Health Steal (Heroes) decreased from 9/12/15/18 to 7/10/13/16 • Max Health and Max Mana bonuses from items are now penalized by the number of Meepos (like other item bonuses) • No longer shares cooldowns of Town Portal Scrolls • Cooldown increased from 60s to 90s • Duration decreased from 25s to 20s • [Talent] Level 10 Talent +40 Poof Damage replaced with -1.5s Earthbind Cooldown • [Talent] Level 15 Talent -2.5s Earthbind Cooldown replaced with +40 Poof Damage • [Talent] Level 20 Talent Ransack Health Steal decreased from +7 to +6 Treant Protector: • Cooldown increased from 20/19/18/17s to 23/21/19/17s Rubick: • [Talent] Level 20 Talent Telekinesis Landing Damage decreased from 325 to 300 Nyx Assassin: • Duration decreased from 60s to 45/50/55s Naga Siren: • Base Attack Speed decreased from 110 to 100 • Evasion per Naga decreased from 4.9% + 0.1% per level to 4% + 0.1% per level Keeper of the Light: • Intelligence required for 1 movement speed increased from 2.5 to 3 • Cast Range Bonus decreased from 100/200/300 to 100/175/250 • [Talent] Level 15 Talent Spirit Form Bright Speed Bonus decreased from +30% to +25% Slark: • Duration decreased from 12.5s + 2.5s per level to 10s + 2.5s per level • [Talent] Level 20 Talent Essence Shift Duration decreased from +25s to +20s Magnus: • Agility gain increased from 2.0 to 2.2 • Damage gain per level increased from 3.2 to 3.3 Timbersaw: • Damage rescaled from 75/120/165/210 to 60/120/180/240 • Damage increased from 45/100/155/210 to 45/105/165/225 • Pass Damage rescaled from 100/150/200 to 75/150/225 Tusk: • Attack Slow decreased from 17 + 3 per level to 12 + 3 per level • No longer has an alt-cast • Bonus Armor decreased from 10 to 7 Skywrath Mage: • Base Mana Regen increased by 0.25 Elder Titan: • Bonus Speed to Armor increased from 3.6% + 0.4% per level to 5.0% + 0.5% per level Techies: • [Talent] Level 10 Talent Magic Resistance decreased from +20% to +15% • [Talent] Level 15 Talent Blast Off! Damage decreased from +200 to +175 Ember Spirit: • Base Damage decreased by 3 • Damage at level 1 decreased from 55-59 to 52-56 • Mana Cost increased from 60/65/70/75 to 75 Terrorblade: • [Talent] Level 20 Talent Conjure Image Duration decreased from +10s to +8s Phoenix: • Base Attack Range decreased from 525 to 500 • Aghanim's Shard no longer slows affected enemies by 10% Arc Warden: • [Talent] Level 20 Talent Magnetic Field Cooldown Reduction decreased from 5s to 4s • [Talent] Level 20 Talent +200 Spark Wraith Damage replaced with +30s Spark Wraith Duration • [Talent] Level 25 Talent +30s Spark Wraith Duration replaced with +240 Spark Wraith Damage • [Talent] Level 25 Talent Runic Infusion All Attributes Bonus decreased from +1.5 to +1 Monkey King: • Cooldown increased from 3s to 5s • [Talent] Level 10 Talent Tree Dance Cast Range decreased from +350 to +300 Pangolier: • Attack Speed Reduction decreased from 40/80/120/160 to 35/70/105/140 • Total Attack Damage as Damage decreased from 100% to 80% Hoodwink: • Debuff Duration decreased from 7s to 6s Void Spirit: • Damage decreased from 120/200/280/360 to 105/185/265/345 Snapfire: • Cooldown decreased from 18/15/12/9s to 17/14/11/8s • Initial radius increased from 225 to 250 Dawnbreaker: • Max Damage Increase decreased from 10% + 1% per level to 8% + 1% per level Primal Beast: • Cooldown increased from 40/35/30s to 45/40/35s • [Talent] Level 10 Talent Damage decreased from +30 to +25 Largo: • Bonus Duration increased from 9% + 1% per level to 10% + 1% per level • Mana Cost rescaled from 25/35/45/55 to 40 • Duration increased from 12/18/24/30s to 15/20/25/30s • Aghanim's Scepter Damage per stack decreased from 6/12/18 to 6/10/14 • [Talent] Level 20 Talent Catchy Lick Damage increased from +170 to +200 ITEM CHANGES: • Avatar now has a fixed duration and is not affected by buff duration amplification • All Attributes bonus decreased from +6 to +5 • Hallowed stacks are now item charges instead of a stack counter on the buff • All charges are consumed when the barrier is created • Charge Restore Time of Hallowed is not affected by effects that reduce or modify cooldowns • Hallowed now starts with all 3 charges when Consecrated Wraps is purchased or built • Gaining max stacks requirement for the speedup buff is removed • Initial 3 charges don't provide the movement speed buff • Hallowed charge gain time increased from 3s to 4s • Eternal Chains radius increased from 275 to 325 • Effective radius increased from 350 to 400 due to item's built-in Area of Effect bonus • Health Regen bonus increased from +6 to +6.5 • Dominate cooldown decreased from 45s to 40s • Dominate target unit's max health minimum increased from 1800 to 1900 • Energy Charge incoming Heal Amplification increased from 10% to 15% • Holy Blessing outgoing Heal Amplification decreased from 15% to 10% • Health Regen bonus decreased from +6 to +5.5 • Magic Resistance bonus decreased from 20% to 18% • Health Restoration bonus decreased from 16% to 12% • Health Restoration bonus decreased from 20% to 16% • Health Restoration bonus decreased from 20% to 16% • Health Restoration bonus decreased from 20% to 16% NEUTRAL ITEM CHANGES: Artifact changes: • Pollinate radius increased from 700 to 900 •
• Spellover now has a 0.1s internal cooldown • Spellover damage threshold increased from 100 to 200 • Spellover damage from hero targets increased from 40 to 80 • Spellover damage from creep targets increased from 15 to 30 • Enchant base Neutral Enchantment bonus decreased from 15% to 10% • False Flight duration increased from 5s to 6.5s • Pupate movement speed bonus increased from 15% to 20% • Reverberate projectile physical damage decreased from 110 to 90 •
• Demonic Warrior no longer has True Sight ability • Lesser Avatar bonus magic resistance increased from 50% to 60% • Refract cooldown decreased from 30s to 27s Enchantment changes: • Health Restoration bonus decreased from +10/15/20% to +9/12/15%
